channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Spinal instability may be the primary cause of pain in sacral metastases as opposed to neurologic compromise
item.description: 1. Although neurological symptoms (motor deficits, sensory impairment) were more frequent in patients with sitting-related sacral pain on univariate c...

item.title: Researchers launch global initiative to study disappearing heritage diets
item.description: The world's "heritage" diets could hold vital clues to better health. Writing in Nature Medicine, researchers from 12 countries have launched the Worl...

item.title: Study shows a blood test can help identify healthy people at high risk for Alzheimer's disease
item.description: A blood test may predict if apparently healthy older adults are likely to develop Alzheimer's symptoms in the next five or 10 years, researchers repor...

item.title: Survival rates for adults with congenital heart disease linked to specialized cardiac care access
item.description: People with congenital heart disease living in states with low household incomes and limited access to health insurance and the specialized care they ...
